---
title: "Psychology Student Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: [cosmo, ../custom.scss]
    logo: ../assets/images/svg/goldpsychr-logo-animated.svg
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: house
        href: ../index.qmd
    orientation: rows
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Seeded RNG for reproducible fake data
function mulberry32(a) {
  return function() {
    a |= 0; a = a + 0x6D2B79F5 | 0;
    var t = Math.imul(a ^ a >>> 15, 1 | a);
    t = t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, 61 | t) ^ t;
    return ((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
  }
}
rand = mulberry32(2026)
```

## Row {height=25%}

### {.valuebox}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| component: valuebox
viewof _vb1 = {
  return Object.assign(document.createElement("div"), {});
}
```

**Modules Active**

<span style="font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #9B1B30;">6</span>

of 6 enrolled

### {.valuebox}

**Current Average**

<span style="font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #28a745;">64.2%</span>

Upper Second Class

### {.valuebox}

**Assessments Due**

<span style="font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #E78021;">3</span>

in the next 30 days

### {.valuebox}

**Attendance**

<span style="font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #61589C;">87%</span>

above 75% threshold

## Row {height=40%}

### Module Progress {width=60%}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

modules = [
  { module: "PS51009D Apps of Psych Research", grade: 68, credits: 15, status: "In progress" },
  { module: "PS52010A Cognitive Psychology", grade: 62, credits: 15, status: "In progress" },
  { module: "PS52011A Social Psychology", grade: 71, credits: 15, status: "Complete" },
  { module: "PS52012A Developmental Psychology", grade: 58, credits: 15, status: "In progress" },
  { module: "PS52013A Biological Psychology", grade: 65, credits: 15, status: "In progress" },
  { module: "PS52014A Research Methods 2", grade: 61, credits: 15, status: "In progress" }
]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  height: 280,
  marginLeft: 220,
  marginRight: 40,
  style: { fontSize: "12px", fontFamily: "Source Sans 3, sans-serif" },
  x: {
    label: "Grade (%)",
    domain: [0, 100],
    grid: true
  },
  y: {
    label: null
  },
  color: {
    domain: ["First", "2:1", "2:2", "Third"],
    range: ["#9B1B30", "#28a745", "#E78021", "#6c757d"]
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.ruleX([40], { stroke: "#dc3545", strokeDasharray: "4,4", strokeOpacity: 0.5 }),
    Plot.ruleX([50], { stroke: "#E78021", strokeDasharray: "4,4", strokeOpacity: 0.5 }),
    Plot.ruleX([60], { stroke: "#28a745", strokeDasharray: "4,4", strokeOpacity: 0.5 }),
    Plot.ruleX([70], { stroke: "#9B1B30", strokeDasharray: "4,4", strokeOpacity: 0.5 }),
    Plot.barX(modules, {
      x: "grade",
      y: "module",
      fill: d => d.grade >= 70 ? "First" : d.grade >= 60 ? "2:1" : d.grade >= 50 ? "2:2" : "Third",
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${d.module}: ${d.grade}%`
    }),
    Plot.text(modules, {
      x: d => d.grade + 1.5,
      y: "module",
      text: d => `${d.grade}%`,
      fontSize: 11,
      textAnchor: "start"
    })
  ]
})
```

### Upcoming Deadlines {width=40%}

| Date | Module | Assessment | Weight |
|------|--------|-----------|--------|
| **28 Mar** | Research Methods 2 | Lab report draft | 0% |
| **11 Apr** | Cognitive Psychology | Essay | 50% |
| **11 May** | PS51009D | Blog post + reflection | 100% |
| **16 May** | Developmental | Research summary | 40% |
| **23 May** | Biological | MCQ exam | 50% |
| **30 May** | Social Psychology | Group presentation | 30% |

## Row {height=35%}

### Grade Distribution Across Modules {width=50%}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Simulate 30 students' averages
studentGrades = {
  const r = mulberry32(123);
  function randn() {
    let u = 0, v = 0;
    while (u === 0) u = r();
    while (v === 0) v = r();
    return Math.sqrt(-2.0 * Math.log(u)) * Math.cos(2.0 * Math.PI * v);
  }
  const grades = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 120; i++) {
    const g = Math.round(58 + randn() * 12);
    grades.push({ grade: Math.max(20, Math.min(95, g)), you: false });
  }
  grades.push({ grade: 64, you: true });
  return grades;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  height: 250,
  marginLeft: 50,
  marginBottom: 40,
  style: { fontSize: "12px", fontFamily: "Source Sans 3, sans-serif" },
  x: { label: "Average grade (%)" },
  y: { label: "Students", grid: true },
  marks: [
    Plot.rectY(studentGrades.filter(d => !d.you), Plot.binX({ y: "count" }, {
      x: "grade",
      fill: "#ddd",
      thresholds: 15
    })),
    Plot.ruleX([64], { stroke: "#9B1B30", strokeWidth: 2.5 }),
    Plot.text([{ x: 66, label: "You: 64%" }], {
      x: "x",
      text: "label",
      dy: -100,
      fill: "#9B1B30",
      fontWeight: 700,
      fontSize: 12
    })
  ]
})
```

### Study Hours This Week {width=50%}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

weekHours = [
  { day: "Mon", hours: 4.5, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Mon", hours: 2.0, type: "Self-study" },
  { day: "Tue", hours: 3.0, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Tue", hours: 1.5, type: "Self-study" },
  { day: "Wed", hours: 2.0, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Wed", hours: 3.0, type: "Self-study" },
  { day: "Thu", hours: 3.0, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Thu", hours: 2.5, type: "Self-study" },
  { day: "Fri", hours: 1.0, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Fri", hours: 4.0, type: "Self-study" },
  { day: "Sat", hours: 0, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Sat", hours: 2.0, type: "Self-study" },
  { day: "Sun", hours: 0, type: "Lectures" },
  { day: "Sun", hours: 1.0, type: "Self-study" }
]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  height: 250,
  marginLeft: 50,
  marginBottom: 40,
  style: { fontSize: "12px", fontFamily: "Source Sans 3, sans-serif" },
  x: {
    label: null,
    domain: ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"]
  },
  y: { label: "Hours", grid: true },
  color: {
    domain: ["Lectures", "Self-study"],
    range: ["#9B1B30", "#61589C"],
    legend: true
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.barY(weekHours, Plot.stackY({
      x: "day",
      y: "hours",
      fill: "type",
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${d.day}: ${d.hours}h ${d.type}`
    })),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```
